_about: Per-operation perf budgets in nanoseconds for the TypeScript implementation. measured = npx tsx scripts/perf-smoke.ts --emit-json. baseline_ns is the median measurement on the listed runner; tolerance_multiplier sets the budget = baseline_ns * tolerance_multiplier. Cloud CI runners (esp. macOS) have wide variance, so the floor is 5x. Single-shot or noise-floor measurements (import time, no-op logger when log level is silent) get 10x.
